theory_page_446.name: Plural Nouns — Множина іменників: правила, винятки, приклади (Page 446)

questions.question: I have two {a1} in my bag.

hints: Правило: більшість іменників утворюють множину додаванням **-s**.
У реченні є числівник **two**, що вказує на множину.

a1.books: ✅ Правильно! Іменник «book» утворює множину додаванням -s → books.
a1.book: ❌ Це форма однини. Числівник «two» вимагає множини.
a1.bookes: ❌ Закінчення -es не потрібне для слів на приголосний + голосний.

variants: I have two {a1} in my bag.

questions.question: She has three {a1}.

hints: Правило: додайте **-s** до більшості іменників для утворення множини.

a1.cats: ✅ Правильно! cat + s = cats — стандартне правило множини.
a1.cates: ❌ Такої форми не існує; правильно — cats.

variants: She has three {a1}.

questions.question: There are five {a1} on the table.

hints: Конструкція **there are** + числівник **five** вказує на множину.

a1.pens: ✅ Правильно! pen → pens — звичайна множина з -s.
a1.pen: ❌ Форма однини не узгоджується з «five» та «are».

variants: There are five {a1} on the table.

questions.question: The {a1} are playing in the garden.

a1.doges: ❌ Форма «doges» не існує в англійській мові.

variants: The {a1} are playing in the garden.

questions.question: My sister bought four {a1}.

hints: Слово «apple» утворює множину за стандартним правилом.

variants: My sister bought four {a1}.

questions.question: She sees two {a1} at the stop.

hints: Правило: якщо іменник закінчується на **-s**, додаємо **-es**.

variants: She sees two {a1} at the stop.

questions.question: Look at those {a1}!

hints: Правило: іменники на **-x** утворюють множину з **-es**.

a1.boxs: ❌ Неправильно; після -x потрібно -es, а не просто -s.

variants: Look at those {a1}!

questions.question: The {a1} are in the kitchen.
variants: The {a1} are in the kitchen.

questions.question: She ate two {a1} for lunch.

hints: Правило: слова на **-ch** утворюють множину з **-es**.

variants: She ate two {a1} for lunch.

questions.question: I need three {a1} for the test.

hints: Іменники на **-ch** потребують закінчення **-es** у множині.

variants: I need three {a1} for the test.

questions.question: The {a1} are crying.

hints: Правило: якщо перед **-y** приголосний, змінюємо **y → ies**.

a1.babies: ✅ Правильно! baby → babies (y → ies після приголосного).
a1.babys: ❌ Неправильно; після приголосного y змінюється на ies.

variants: The {a1} are crying.

questions.question: There are many {a1} in the city.
variants: There are many {a1} in the city.

questions.question: We visited several {a1} yesterday.

hints: Правило y → ies: city закінчується на приголосний + y.

a1.citys: ❌ Коли перед y приголосний, пишемо ies.

variants: We visited several {a1} yesterday.

questions.question: I have two {a1} to my house.

hints: Правило: якщо перед **-y** голосний (**e**), просто додаємо **-s**.

a1.keys: ✅ Правильно! key → keys (голосний + y, тому просто -s).
a1.keies: ❌ Зміна y → ies не потрібна після голосного.

variants: I have two {a1} to my house.

questions.question: The {a1} are on holiday.

hints: Перед **y** стоїть голосний **o**, тому додаємо тільки **-s**.

a1.boies: ❌ Після голосного + y не змінюємо y.

variants: The {a1} are on holiday.

questions.question: The {a1} are playing football.

a1.childs: ❌ Неправильно; child має особливу форму children.

variants: The {a1} are playing football.

questions.question: Two {a1} are waiting outside.
variants: Two {a1} are waiting outside.

questions.question: Three {a1} work in this office.
variants: Three {a1} work in this office.

questions.question: The farmer has many {a1}.

hints: Правило: іменники на **-o** після приголосного часто додають **-es**.

variants: The farmer has many {a1}.

questions.question: She picked some {a1} from the garden.

hints: Слово **tomato** закінчується на приголосний + **o**, тому додаємо **-es**.

variants: She picked some {a1} from the garden.

questions.question: The {a1} are very brave.
variants: The {a1} are very brave.

questions.question: I took many {a1} during my trip.
variants: I took many {a1} during my trip.

questions.question: The band played two {a1}.
variants: The band played two {a1}.

questions.question: There are several {a1} in the fridge.
variants: There are several {a1} in the fridge.

questions.question: I bought some {a1} at the market.

hints: Правило y → ies: перед y стоїть приголосний **r**.

variants: I bought some {a1} at the market.

questions.question: The {a1} flew south for winter.

hints: Butterfly закінчується на приголосний + y, тому y → ies.

variants: The {a1} flew south for winter.

questions.question: My {a1} hurt after the long walk.

hints: Дієслово **hurt** може бути і однина, і множина, але «my feet» — типовий вираз.

variants: My {a1} hurt after the long walk.

questions.question: The dentist checked my {a1}.
variants: The dentist checked my {a1}.

questions.question: Several {a1} flew over the lake.
variants: Several {a1} flew over the lake.

questions.question: The farm has many {a1}.

hints: Слово **sheep** однакове в однині й множині (zero plural).

variants: The farm has many {a1}.

questions.question: He caught three {a1} in the river.

hints: Слово **fish** зазвичай однакове в однині й множині.

a1.fishes: ❌ Можливо в спец. контексті, але fish — стандарт.

variants: He caught three {a1} in the river.

questions.question: The scientist studies {a1}.
variants: The scientist studies {a1}.

questions.question: All the {a1} in the class passed.
variants: All the {a1} in the class passed.

questions.question: The {a1} are very comfortable.
variants: The {a1} are very comfortable.

questions.question: She baked several {a1} for the party.

hints: Cake закінчується на -e, тому просто додаємо -s.

variants: She baked several {a1} for the party.

questions.question: The {a1} on the beach were beautiful.

hints: Shell утворює множину за стандартним правилом.

variants: The {a1} on the beach were beautiful.

questions.question: The {a1} are falling from the trees.
variants: The {a1} are falling from the trees.

questions.question: The chef uses sharp {a1}.
variants: The chef uses sharp {a1}.

questions.question: Both {a1} went to the meeting.
variants: Both {a1} went to the meeting.

questions.question: The {a1} are on the roof.
variants: The {a1} are on the roof.

questions.question: The cat has nine {a1}.
variants: The cat has nine {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} are displayed on the wall.
variants: The {a1} are displayed on the wall.

questions.question: The {a1} were howling at the moon.
variants: The {a1} were howling at the moon.

questions.question: The {a1} are very tall.

a1.rooves: ❌ Roof не змінює f на v.

variants: The {a1} are very tall.

questions.question: The photographer's {a1} were expensive.
variants: The photographer's {a1} were expensive.

questions.question: Both of my {a1} are doctors.

hints: У складених іменниках множина утворюється від головного слова (**brother**).

variants: Both of my {a1} are doctors.

questions.question: The {a1} attended the conference.
variants: The {a1} attended the conference.

questions.question: Many {a1} were walking in the park.
variants: Many {a1} were walking in the park.

questions.question: The hunters saw several {a1} in the forest.

hints: Слово **deer** однакове в однині й множині.

variants: The hunters saw several {a1} in the forest.

questions.question: The fisherman caught many {a1}.

hints: Слово **trout** (форель) однакове в однині й множині.

variants: The fisherman caught many {a1}.

questions.question: We counted twenty {a1}.

hints: Слово **aircraft** однакове в однині й множині.

variants: We counted twenty {a1}.

questions.question: Many {a1} attended the concert.

a1.persons: ❌ Persons — офіційний стиль, але people — стандарт.

variants: Many {a1} attended the concert.

questions.question: The {a1} in the waiting room were impatient.

hints: У розмовній мові множина від person — **people**.

variants: The {a1} in the waiting room were impatient.

questions.question: The {a1} are learning about climate change.

hints: Student утворює множину за стандартним правилом.

variants: The {a1} are learning about climate change.

questions.question: The scientist analyzed the {a1}.
variants: The scientist analyzed the {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} were affected by the change.
variants: The {a1} were affected by the change.

questions.question: The {a1} of the problem were analyzed.
variants: The {a1} of the problem were analyzed.

questions.question: He studied the {a1} of various equations.
variants: He studied the {a1} of various equations.

questions.question: The researchers published their {a1}.
variants: The researchers published their {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} at the hospital were urgent.
variants: The {a1} at the hospital were urgent.

questions.question: The doctor made several {a1}.
variants: The doctor made several {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of his argument were clear.
variants: The {a1} of his argument were clear.

questions.question: Scientists found new {a1} of bacteria.

hints: Слово **species** однакове в однині й множині.
Контекст (new, plural bacteria) вказує на множину.

variants: Scientists found new {a1} of bacteria.

questions.question: The {a1} of the magazine were impressive.
variants: The {a1} of the magazine were impressive.

questions.question: The {a1} of the building are modern.
variants: The {a1} of the building are modern.

questions.question: The {a1} are clearly defined in the contract.

hints: Слово **clause** утворює множину стандартно: clause + s.

variants: The {a1} are clearly defined in the contract.

questions.question: The {a1} about climate is concerning.

hints: Слово **news** завжди в однині, хоча закінчується на -s.

a1.news: ✅ Правильно! News — незлічуваний іменник, завжди однина.

variants: The {a1} about climate is concerning.

questions.question: {a1} is an important subject.

hints: Слово **mathematics** завжди в однині, хоча закінчується на -s.

variants: {a1} is an important subject.

variants: The {a1} are very comfortable.

variants: My {a1} are new.

questions.question: Her {a1} are very stylish.
variants: Her {a1} are very stylish.

questions.question: The team reviewed all the {a1}.
variants: The team reviewed all the {a1}.

questions.question: The biologist studied the cell {a1}.
variants: The biologist studied the cell {a1}.

questions.question: The researcher identified several {a1}.
variants: The researcher identified several {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the university are impressive.
variants: The {a1} of the university are impressive.

questions.question: The book contained several {a1}.
variants: The book contained several {a1}.

questions.question: The report listed all {a1}.
variants: The report listed all {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the organisms were examined.
variants: The {a1} of the organisms were examined.

questions.question: The lecture covered several {a1}.
variants: The lecture covered several {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} in the paintings were analyzed.
variants: The {a1} in the paintings were analyzed.

questions.question: The news covered several political {a1}.
variants: The news covered several political {a1}.

questions.question: The journalist uncovered several {a1}.

hints: Слово **exposé** (французьке) додає -s у множині, зберігаючи accent.

variants: The journalist uncovered several {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the conference were well-attended.
variants: The {a1} of the conference were well-attended.

questions.question: The {a1} need to be checked.
variants: The {a1} need to be checked.

questions.question: The {a1} of the bacteria are complex.
variants: The {a1} of the bacteria are complex.

variants: The architect reviewed the design {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the leaf are visible.
variants: The {a1} of the leaf are visible.

questions.question: The {a1} of the study were significant.
variants: The {a1} of the study were significant.

questions.question: Multiple {a1} were detected in the sample.
variants: Multiple {a1} were detected in the sample.

questions.question: The document contained several {a1}.
variants: The document contained several {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the elite are often misunderstood.
variants: The {a1} of the elite are often misunderstood.

questions.question: The professor discussed the {a1} of knowledge.
variants: The professor discussed the {a1} of knowledge.

questions.question: The {a1} of this theory are questionable.
variants: The {a1} of this theory are questionable.

questions.question: The {a1} were found in the ancient temple.
variants: The {a1} were found in the ancient temple.

questions.question: The {a1} of the stars were calculated.
variants: The {a1} of the stars were calculated.

questions.question: The text contained multiple {a1}.
variants: The text contained multiple {a1}.

questions.question: The {a1} of the argument are sound.
variants: The {a1} of the argument are sound.

questions.question: The {a1} of the experiment were recorded.
variants: The {a1} of the experiment were recorded.

questions.question: The {a1} of the document were corrected.
variants: The {a1} of the document were corrected.

questions.question: The {a1} of the body were examined.
variants: The {a1} of the body were examined.

questions.question: The {a1} of the insect are complex.

a1.antennas: ❌ Можливо для техніки, але antennae — для біології.

variants: The {a1} of the insect are complex.

variants: The {a1} of the case are complex.

questions.question: The {a1} of the sentence are clear.
variants: The {a1} of the sentence are clear.

questions.question: The {a1} of the coins were studied.
variants: The {a1} of the coins were studied.

questions.question: The {a1} of the two languages are different.
variants: The {a1} of the two languages are different.

questions.question: The {a1} of the orchestra were demanding.
variants: The {a1} of the orchestra were demanding.

questions.question: The {a1} were published in several journals.
variants: The {a1} were published in several journals.

questions.question: The {a1} of the plant are visible.
variants: The {a1} of the plant are visible.

theory_page.title: Plural Nouns — Множина іменників: правила, винятки, приклади
